MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Claims Filed By Defendants California Department Of Aging And Frances Mueller, Acting Director, California Department Of Aging
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Claims Filed By Defendants California Department Of Aging And Frances Mueller, Acting Director, California Department Of Aging is off calendar per request of the moving party pemail dated 8/12/19.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
